opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is so tight and thick it feels like it's going to tear open if I move. My elbows and knees are bleeding continuously, and the pain is unbearable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: An explosive whole-body flare of my long-standing scaly skin condition with painful cracking and bleeding.

symptom_narrative.onset: explosive flare over 7 days after stress and a strep throat
symptom_narrative.character: thick red scaly plaques, tight, cracking and bleeding
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable skin pain; can't move joints; bed-bound
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: elbows, knees, lower back, scalp, spreading to the trunk
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: shedding lots of silvery scale; deep painful cracks; new plaques where I scratched; no high fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: 10 years of a scaly plaque skin condition

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a long-standing scaly plaque skin condition for 10 years
recent strep throat infection; recent major stress

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: topical calcipotriol/betamethasone (not using much — too large an area)

communication_style.typical_message_style: in severe pain, focused on the skin

objective_data_offered.value: widespread thick red plaques with dense silvery scale on elbows, knees, lower back, scalp and trunk; deep painful cracks in the elbow/knee creases; lots of shed scale; nail pitting
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot estimate exact body-surface area or examine for pustules closely
